evidence.snippet: Meet the new standard in military tactical broadband, agile digital phased array radios built for tough environments.

The RADIONOR radios are the next-generation solution for point-to-multipoint tactical broadband data links. The system creates wireless IP connectivity between multiple nodes with exceptional range and bandwidth.

items.notes: Primary business is military tactical broadband phased array radios and data links (CRE 2 series, BLACKBEAM™) for land, sea, air, and unmanned platforms.

evidence.snippet:
### World Leader in Phased Array
Communication and Navigation Systems
Our technology uses radio navigation that works when GNSS doesn’t. Units keep accurate position and reliable communications even when satellite signals are blocked or spoofed.

items.notes: Several products include integrated high-precision geolocation navigation (REDBOX™, CRE2-MUAV-NAV, CRE2-SUAV-NAV). Homepage claims 'World Leader in Phased Array Communication and Navigation Systems' and radio navigation that works when GNSS fails.

evidence.snippet: Travbanevegen 2, 7061 Trondheim
Compact and lightweight radio transceiver designed for integration into small unmanned systems.
Horizontally mounted panel with radio transceiver and antennas ideal for UAV applications.
CRE2-SUAV-NAV is a combat proven tactical long range wireless communications sys-tem extended with a high precision geolocation navigation system.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures tactical broadband radio and data link modules explicitly for integration into UAVs/UAS (CRE2-MUAV, CRE2-TUAV, CRE2-SUAV-NAV). Not a complete drone OEM and not a simple component; delivers functional radio subsystems.

evidence.snippet: ### Combat Proven Technology
CRE2-SUAV-NAV is a combat proven tactical long range wireless communications sys-tem extended with a high precision geolocation navigation system.

readiness.notes: Multiple distinct catalog SKUs advertised; CRE2-SUAV-NAV explicitly described as 'combat proven'. Company claims 25 years of R&D and 'Combat Proven Technology'.

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status not disclosed (Norwegian company, may apply for US sales)
Blue UAS cleared list status not mentioned
BLACKBEAM™ product specs and timeline unclear — page skipped in crawl

Dedicated 'Unmanned' domain page would enumerate UAV-specific applications and use-cases, potentially clarifying supply chain role and product coverage.
Would provide details on the BLACKBEAM™ coming-soon product including specs and availability timeline.

tagline: Norwegian phased-array radio manufacturer producing compact tactical broadband transceivers (CRE2 series) and navigation modules for unmanned systems, manned platforms, and fixed infrastructure. Products span multiple form factors for aerial, maritime, and land domains; one model (CRE2-SUAV-NAV) noted as combat-proven. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence of US defense contracts or integration roadmaps is limited.
